category_sources: source_facts.description says portable command-line tool for testing command-line programs; official GitHub README says shelltestrunner tests CLI programs and commands.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is shelltestrunner; official repository README names shelltestrunner and executable shelltest.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the documentation surface with install, usage, options, and test format sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub project; official README identifies the repository and project.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists shelltest; official README describes command-line test specifications, expected stdout/stderr, exit status, parallelism, and timeouts.
